prompt: Create a high-fashion street style editorial portrait of a stylish young woman standing outdoors in front of a softly blurred modern city building. She has dark brown hair styled into one long, thick French side braid draped over her right shoulder, with a few loose face-framing strands. Her face is intentionally obscured by a centered square mosaic blur, but black designer sunglasses are still partially visible at the sides. She wears a premium oversized beige short-sleeve T-shirt tucked into high-waisted tailored beige trousers with belt loops and front pleats. Include exactly two visible jewelry/accessory pieces: a minimalist thick gold chain necklace around her neck and a luxury silver wristwatch on the wrist of the hand raised to touch the braid. Pose her from mid-thigh upward, body angled slightly left, one arm relaxed down and the other bent with the hand near the braid. Use natural daylight, shallow depth of field, realistic fabric texture, muted neutral tones, luxury minimalist styling, editorial fashion photography, 1:1 square composition, crisp subject focus, soft urban bokeh background, no text, no watermark.
